llm_eval.notes: frontmatter name/description妥当・allowed-tools:[Skill]・argument-hint有。owner skill run-intake-revise/SKILL.md 実在し flow(既存4ファイルload→差分hear→analyze再実行→preview→Gate R→PATCH→revision-log→self-updater)・exit code 2/44/51/60・dry-run記述が完全整合。参照(prompts/R1-main.md, schemas/output.schema.json, references/resource-map.yaml, references/keychain-setup.md)全て実在。intake_publish_pipeline.pyに--revise/--page-id/--page-url/--dry-run実装確認。placement正:commandはSkill薄dispatcher(prompts/R1-main.md=SSOT正本・agentsは別interview役で逆転なし)。related参照(/intake,/intake-publish,/intake-status)全コマンド実在。dangling/schema虚偽/owner矛盾/placement違反なし。nit:失敗時節がexit61(self-updater失敗)を省略するがskill側で網羅済・load-bearing falsehoodでない減点のみ
